scope: Unified End-to-End Theorem — P8-G01 through P8-G07

theorem_scope_audit.what_theorem_proves: If checker accepts certificate → accepted args have PROVED status AND provenance/temporal/jurisdiction safety hold.
theorem_scope_audit.external_premises: hprov (provenance witness), htemp (temporal well-formedness), hjur (jurisdiction mapping) — all caller-provided hypotheses.
theorem_scope_audit.derived_conclusions: check_sound (decision correctness from checker), composition of all safety predicates.
theorem_scope_audit.forbidden_claim: Theorem does NOT derive safety properties from checker alone. Safety witnesses must be provided externally.
